The health and well-being of our people is at the very heart of what we do. We're committed to providing excellent care for everyone who comes through our doors, and that includes you. That's why we offer a range of flexible benefits, so you can choose what's important to you and access the tools and support you need, anytime, anywhere. Note: Benefit offerings may vary based on your employment status and/or location. Mental, dental, vision and so much more. From affordable telehealth options to personalized healthcare navigation services, Lifepoint offers all the benefits you need to protect your health and coordinate your care from anywhere. We offer various medical plan options so you can choose what fits your lifestyle. Each option covers the same care, the same services and the same providers. The difference is how much and when you pay. You can get care from any in-network provider. **But you'll save even more when you get care from a Lifepoint Facility**. When you enroll in a Lifepoint medical. dental or vision plan, you get exclusive access to discounts on health and wellness products and services. From athletic gear to fitness programs and personal care, we're working hard to take care of your health and your finances. Prescription drug coverage is included in your Lifepoint health plan. Fill your medications at any in-network retail pharmacy or get 90-day prescriptions delivered right to your door! FREE generic medications for chronic conditions like asthma, cardiovascular, cholesterol and diabetes through the no-cost drug list. Generic and certain brand medications for diabetes are available at no cost if you meet the requirements of the diabetes management program (the Good Health Gateway Program). Pay for only what you need. You have two dental plan options available through Lifepoint, so you can choose the level of coverage that fits your needs and budget. Expanded services are available to employees and covered dependents who are diagnosed with conditions such as diabetes, certain head and neck cancers, rheumatoid arthritis and coronary artery disease who need additional oral health support. Choose between two plan options to keep your eyes healthy and your vision sharp. You'll have access to a wide selection of doctors and participating retail chains, including Lenscrafters, Target Optical, Pearle Vision, Walmart, Costco, and Sam's. Plus! Discounts on laser vision correction. Additional benefits are also available for members diagnosed with diabetes. No-cost virtual care services are available through Revive. Access urgent care and behavioral health care 24/7. Other services include psychiatry, dermatology, and nutrition counseling. (Behavioral health services are provided through our EAP, Revive & Thrive.) Work with licensed providers, including doctors, therapists and psychiatrists Providers can diagnose, treat and provide prescriptions Connect via phone, web or app Lifepoint Health has partnered with Wellhub to provide free or discounted memberships to employees and their families, offering access to a network of gyms, fitness classes, and wellness apps. 24/7 access to licensed doctors, therapists, and psychiatrists. Teladoc providers can diagnose, treat, and prescribe medication. Connect by phone, web, or app from anywhere. Your mental and emotional health is just as important as your physical health. We offer benefits to help you with everything from anxiety and burnout to the everyday stress of life. You and your family have 24/7 access to our free, 100% confidential, Employee Assistance Program (EAP) where you can find tools, resources and support for emotional and psychological concerns like grief, anxiety, depression, relationship difficulties, work or family stress, or alcohol and drug abuse and more. 12 free counselling sessions per issue per year for both employees and eligible dependents. Your name, information and reasons for calling will never be shared with Lifepoint. You can speak to a licensed psychiatrist or therapist through the telemedicine vendor and get access to confidential support for grief, anxiety, depression, stress, relational conflict and trauma support. Our benefit programs are designed to reflect the diverse needs of our workforce, helping you focus on the things that matter most to you. If you are enrolled in a BCBST medical plan, Quantum Health Care Coordinators can help connect you to providers and resources specific to your needs, such as gender affirming care and mental health support. We know how important your family is to you. Whether you are looking to grow your family or need some extra support caring for them, we have resources to help. When you're adopting a child, we want you to know you have our full support. That's why, after a full year of service, we help you cover the cost of adoption. Get reimbursed up to $3,000 per child or $4,000 for a special needs child. Use this benefit for licensed adoption agency fees, court and legal fees, transportation, costs associated with home studies or other pre- or post-placement supervision. FEDlogic is your personal assistant for navigating federal and state benefits for you and your family such as Medicare, Medicaid, COBRA and more. As a Lifepoint Health employee, you have unlimited access to FEDlogic services and their experts who are there to provide you with unbiased guidance and insight, specific to your situation and needs. Family Support through the EAP The Employee Assistance Program (EAP) available through Revive & Thrive can connect you with all kinds of confidential support including: Assistance finding eldercare, childcare and pet care Dependent Care Flexible Spending Account Set aside tax-free dollars directly from your paycheck to use for eligible child or dependent adult care expenses throughout the year. Lifepoint gives you the tools you need to make positive steps toward your financial goals. We offer benefits that help you save for retirement, protect your income, cover the cost of healthcare and much more. Lifepoint provides Basic Life and Accidental Death and Dismemberment (AD&D) insurance coverage at no cost to you. Additional Life and AD&D coverage is available to you and your family, including Group Life and Long-Term Care coverage. Lifepoint also offers Disability coverage. Additional protection for life's unexpected twists. These plans are affordable and convenient, with premiums deducted from your paycheck. You can use the payment from these benefits however you need to: medical bills, transportation, rent, childcare or groceries. It's up to you. It's never too late, or too soon, to start saving for your future. That's why we've got you covered with our Retirement Plan (401(k)). Employees are eligible to participate after 30 days. And if you make a contribution, we'll match it! Even with medical coverage, out-of-pocket care expenses add up quickly. To supplement your coverage, we offer various tax-advantaged saving and spending accounts. These let you set aside tax-free dollars directly from your paycheck to use for health care expenses. **Health Care Flexible Spending Account (FSA)** Use to pay for medical, prescription, dental and vision expenses. **Limited Purpose Flexible Spending Account (FSA)** Use to pay for dental and vision expenses only. Use to pay for medical, prescription, dental and vision expenses or save for the future. Lifepoint helps grow your savings by contributing to your HSA. At Lifepoint, we know how important it is to connect with, get support from and give back to your community. We believe that all our employees and their families should have access to health care coverage. That's why we provide the Helping Hand Fund - a program that provides financial support to employees who need assistance paying for their health care benefits. The Helping Hand Fund provides provides medical coverage at zero cost if your household income is not greater than 250% of the Federal Poverty Level. This program is offered each year during Annual Enrollment. In times of great difficulty, we must look out for each other. That's why we have the LifeCare Disaster Recovery Fund which provides short-term, emergency support to Lifepoint employees and their families in times of acute financial hardship or have been affected by a significant natural disaster, including the COVID-19 pandemic. Feeling valued, respected, and supported by others goes a long way towards fostering happiness, resilience and a sense of fulfillment in your life. At Lifepoint Health, we believe in the power of community and support. That's why we offer a range of Employee Resource Groups (ERGs) designed to bring together individuals who share common characteristics or life experiences. EMBRACE: Empowering LGBTQ+ team members and allies, fostering understanding and advocacy. EMERGE: Creating visibility and support for employees from Black communities and their allies. EMPOWER: Supporting and advocating for women and their allies, promoting professional development and community engagement. UNIDOS: Connecting, learning, and growing with our network of Hispanic/Latino employees and allies. HONOR: Supporting, promoting, and advocating for our Veterans and allies. AAPI: Fostering community, supporting personal and professional development and honoring the remarkable contributions of the AAPI community. ENVISION: recognizes and celebrates all types of Asian heritage, including those of East Asian and Central Asian descent, as well as Pacific Islanders. Together we can build and nurture a supportive and inclusive environment at Lifepoint Health. Pet insurance, commuter benefits, legal assistance… whatever life throws your way, we have benefits to help. Set aside tax-free dollars from your paycheck to cover eligible transit expenses related to your commute to and from work. Commuter Benefits never expire, and you can activate, pause, change or update this benefit at any time. Keep your personal information private. We've partnered with ID Watchdog to bring you best-in-class identity theft protection. Easy-to-read reports that can flag potential pre-existing issues as far back as 30+ years. Real-time credit alerts, so you can keep an eye on any strange activity. Friendly resolution experts who keep on top of your case until it is completely resolved. A legal insurance plan can ease the stress of finding and paying for legal expertise when you need it. What you get when you enroll in LegalEASE: An attorney with expertise specific to your personal legal matter Access to a national network of expert attorneys who are matched to your needs Concierge help navigating common individual or family legal issues We believe in creating an exceptional work environment that goes beyond the ordinary. Our Marketplace offers an array of benefits and perks, designed exclusively for our employees. These programs offer significant savings on items you're already buying and using like: Access to the Corporate Shopping Discount Program offers incredible discounts and exclusive offers on a wide range of products and services. With this program, employees can enjoy convenient online shopping, significant savings on various purchases and discounts on travel expenses.
